notes: Phase 3 (Mount Hyjal & Black Temple, Tier 6) Best in Slot from the Icy Veins TBC Classic Protection Warrior Tank gear guide — sourced from the original 2007-2008 Burning Crusade release (both raid tiers are already fully documented regardless of the TBC Anniversary realm's current progress). Enchants show the top-ranked pick per slot; the guide page lists further ranked alternatives. Gems are the general class/role recommendation from the guide's gemming section.

gems.name: Powerful Earthstorm Diamond (+16 stamina, +2% armor) — or Relentless Earthstorm Diamond for threat
Shifting Nightseye (+5 dodge / +6 stamina) — or Glinting Noble Topaz (hit) once hit-capped isn't needed
Enduring Talasite (+4 defense / +6 stamina) — or Jagged/Glinting variants for socket bonus
